parameters.text:
=IMPORTANT:
All output MUST be written exclusively in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR).

Do not use English words, labels, field values, titles, descriptions, suite names, plan names, or explanations.

All generated content must be natural and professional Brazilian Portuguese.

Act as a Senior QA Analyst specialized in test planning for Azure DevOps.

Project:
{{ $json.body.nome_projeto }}

Functional Specification:
{{ $json.body.document_text }}

Coverage Matrix:
{{ $json.body.matriz_cobertura }}

Generated Test Cases (use the exact titles to populate the 'casos' field of each Suite):
{{ $json.body.casos_de_teste }}

Business Clarifications:
{{ $json.body.respostas_duvidas }}

Your task is to organize the Test Cases above into a hierarchy of Test Plans and Test Suites compatible with Azure DevOps.

RULES:
1. First, analyze the Test Cases and identify how many DISTINCT testing scopes are present among them (examples of scopes: Functional/Business Flows, Data Integration & ETL, Security & Access Control, Non-Functional/Performance, Regression, Smoke). Create exactly ONE Test Plan PER distinct scope you identify, up to a maximum of 3 Plans.
2. Only produce a SINGLE Test Plan if, after this analysis, ALL Test Cases genuinely belong to the same testing scope. If you identify 2 or more distinct scopes, you MUST create a separate Plan for each one — do not lump everything into one Plan for convenience.
3. Each Plan must contain at least 1 Test Suite. Each Suite must group Test Cases by functional area, feature, or business flow within that Plan's scope.
4. EVERY Test Case listed in the input MUST be assigned to exactly one Suite in exactly one Plan. Do not leave any Test Case unassigned, and do not duplicate a Test Case across more than one Suite or Plan.
5. Use the EXACT title string from the 'titulo' field of each Test Case in the 'casos' array. Do not paraphrase or translate titles.
6. Do not create empty Suites or empty Plans. Do not invent Test Cases that are not in the input list.
8. Plan names and Suite names must be descriptive, clear, and written in Brazilian Portuguese.
9. The 'descricao' field is optional but recommended for Plans and Suites; for Plans, it should briefly explain the testing scope that Plan covers.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
